name: Cart drawer quantity controls and item removal update the totals
description: Verifies that after adding a mat set to the cart, increasing quantity in the cart drawer updates the line total and header badge, and removing the item empties the cart.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /olusturucu, select any brand and model in the 'Aracınızı Seçin' section, type '2021' into 'Model yılı' and 'Sedan' into 'Kasa / versiyon', pick any floor and edge color, then click 'Sepete Ekle'
Click the 'Sepet' (cart) button in the header to open the cart drawer
The cart drawer shows exactly 1 item with quantity 1
Click the plus (increase quantity) button on the cart item
The item's quantity shown in the drawer becomes 2 and the line price doubles
Click the minus (decrease quantity) button on the cart item twice
The item is removed from the cart and the drawer shows the empty-cart state 'Sepetiniz boş'
